title: smilax campestris
intro: Smilax campestris, also known as the wild sarsaparilla, is a type of flowering plant native to the eastern regions of North America. The plant's roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Smilax campestris include its ability to aid in the treatment of arthritis, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of roots, which are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules.
